extract: The Shrouded Ruins (Japanese: 霧の遺跡 Foggy Ruins) is an area located in the northern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. It is located east of Cloudpool Ridge and the Brava Arena, north of Diamond Heath, and northwest of Lake Valor. In the climax of the story, this is the setting where Red Chain is forged with the help of the lake guardians. The Shrouded Ruins also plays a role in Request 22: "Eerie Apparitions in the Night", being the place where Spiritomb first appear once the player collects all the wisps scattered across the Hisui region.
